description_long: This rustic cabin is set on a raised plot of earth, surrounded by a wooden fence and lush greenery. The main structure features weathered wooden siding, a stone chimney, and a steep gable roof covered in mossy shingles. A covered porch with wooden railings runs along the front, while a small dock extends over a pond with a rowboat moored nearby. Adjacent to the cabin, a large tree supports a treehouse accessed by a ladder, and an old tractor is parked near a wooden gate. The property is dotted with mature trees, shrubs, and a variety of outdoor elements, creating a secluded, natural atmosphere. The overall scene evokes a peaceful, rural homestead with a strong connection to nature.
description: A weathered wooden cabin with a mossy gable roof, stone chimney, front porch, and treehouse, set on a lush, fenced plot with a pond and dock.
description_view_0: The front of the cabin is visible, showing the porch, main entrance, and treehouse nestled in the trees behind.
description_view_1: The side and rear of the cabin are shown, highlighting the stone chimney, additional outbuildings, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_2: The back of the property is visible, featuring the treehouse, wooden gate, and an old tractor near the fence.
description_view_3: A clear view of the front porch, dock, pond, and rowboat, with the cabin and treehouse framed by trees.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in weathered shingles and featuring a stone chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small rectangular windows are asymmetrically distributed along the front and side facades, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced individually.
attribute_door_placement: A single main door is centered on the front porch, with no other exterior doors visible in the images.
